history_relationship.reason: The reported local seed commit is not reachable through the connected GitHub repository, branches, pull requests, or organization commit search. A local merge-base check is still required.

safe_reconciliation_strategy: Run scripts/Test-RepositoryFloor.ps1 in the reported local repository and capture its JSON output.
Create a local preservation branch at 6e91164 and push it as preserve/local-bootstrap-seed so the original local root commit remains reachable.
Fetch origin and create an integration worktree from origin/main.
Restore the bootstrap source files from preserve/local-bootstrap-seed into the integration worktree without importing the generated ZIP by default.
Commit the imported source files on a bounded integration branch, validate, push, and update this pull request.

current_blocker.description: The connected GitHub environment cannot inspect or push the reported local-only commit or its files.
current_blocker.smallest_safe_resolution: Run the repository-floor probe locally, then push 6e91164 to preserve/local-bootstrap-seed before importing files onto the remote-main-based integration branch.
